subcodes.first_line: O denizen of the spiritual realms, the world-weary dervish is consumed by this soul-stirring divine melody. The time hath come for thee to bring to life through this plaintive cry [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: درویش جهان سوخت از این نغمه جانسوز الهی وقت آنست کنی زنده از این ناله زار ای
subcodes.subjects: @spiritual transformation, @divine unity [tawhid] and degrees of unity, @tests and trials; sacrifice and suffering, @Manifestation of God as tree of life; sadratu'l-muntaha, @spiritual emotions and susceptibilities
